description: One Excalidraw element keyed by its native stable ID. Numeric geometry stays inside element_json until packet snapshots support numbers directly.

order_key.description: A stable fractional key representing array order independently from identity.

leading_json.description: Exact whitespace before this array item; commas are supplied by the renderer.

element_type.description: The element type derived from element_json for convenient queries.

is_deleted.description: The deletion state derived from element_json.

element_json.description: The complete exact JSON object encoded as text, including all numeric geometry and forward-compatible fields.
